summary: Skip-tests rationale for Task 8 is fully justified and properly documented. D8 in user-spec (line 139) and patterns.md § Test Infrastructure (lines 67-73) explicitly defer autotests to Phase 2 and place Compose UI tests out of scope for the whole project. ModelManagerViewModel is a trivial 30-line proxy (direct StateFlow pass-through + two 1-line delegates + one launch{emit}); any unit test written today would either fail the litmus test (Category 1/2 bad tests: mock-only assertions on registry delegation, identity assertion on StateFlow pass-through) or require standing up the JUnit5+MockK+turbine infra one phase early, directly contradicting D8's asymmetric-payoff reasoning. Manual verification steps cover user-spec 'Пользователь проверяет' items 3 and 6 correctly; coverage of item 4 is partial — the task manually checks progress growth and foreground notification but stops mid-download and never drives a download to the terminal SUCCEEDED state, so the 'Скачано' badge + btn_load branch of ModelStatusRow is not observed in the Task 8 on-device checklist (it will be exercised implicitly in Task 10 when Load→chat wiring is verified, but that leaves the SUCCEEDED UI branch unverified for the duration of Phase 1 wave 3). One minor: task line 61 and line 100 claim 'Покрыты шаги 3, 4, 6' — the claim is accurate for 3 and 6, overstated for 4.

findings.issue: User Verification step 2 stops at 'progress text values grow' and does not drive the download to 100% / terminal SUCCEEDED state. The ModelStatusRow SUCCEEDED branch (badge model_status_downloaded + btn_load, the only branch whose button is wired to onLoad → NavEvent.OpenChat) therefore has zero verification in Task 8 — neither automated (skipped per D8, defensible) nor manual. User-spec 'Пользователь проверяет' step 4 explicitly requires 'По завершении — статус «Скачано», файл на месте', which Task 8's claim of covering step 4 does not fully deliver.
findings.suggestion: Append one bullet to Verification Steps → User: 'Дождаться завершения скачивания E2B (~2.4 ГБ): статус меняется на «Скачано» (ключ model_status_downloaded), вместо «Отмена» появляется кнопка «Загрузить» (btn_load). Кнопку не нажимать — wiring в чат валидируется Task 10.' This closes the coverage gap without introducing Compose UI tests and without depending on Task 10.

findings.issue: Task line 'Покрыты шаги user-spec § «Пользователь проверяет» 3, 4, 6' overstates coverage: step 4 is only partially covered (progress growth + foreground notification yes; terminal SUCCEEDED state + «Скачано» + btn_load no). Misleading for reviewers of downstream waves.
findings.suggestion: After adding the terminal-state bullet above, this line becomes accurate. Alternatively, if the bullet is not added, change the claim to 'Покрыты шаги 3 и 6 полностью; шаг 4 — частично (до середины загрузки), терминальное состояние SUCCEEDED проверяется в Task 10 после wiring Load → ChatScreen.'

findings.issue: onDownload discards the Flow<ModelDownloadStatus> returned by registry.download. Task description explicitly sanctions fire-and-forget (line 31 of tasks/8.md) since registry updates its StateFlow through DownloadRepository callbacks, so this is a documented design choice, not a bug. Called out only so a future reviewer doesn't flag it as a lost Flow subscription.
findings.suggestion: No code change. If desired for explicitness, either (a) add a one-line comment '// Fire-and-forget: registry.models StateFlow is the single source of truth; download Flow is redundant here (see tasks/8.md §What to do #1).' or (b) leave as-is — the task file already documents the choice.
